events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Conclusion: **fail** (medium risk) — the freeze-frame data was interpreted as current/live conditions rather than the snapshot captured at the moment the DTC set (per SAE J1979/OBD-II), and there's no confirmation the frame ties to the priority DTC or that PIDs were checked against OEM enabling criteria, so the diagnostic conclusion isn't supported as-read.
